from the Sun indicates that the native's father will be prosperous. Mars and
,Jupiter are in the fourth house from the Sun. This indicates that the father will
be holding a high official position. He will be an obstinate and ,JCOUdpersbn.
But, the position of Saturn in Aries causes a detrimental effect and so although
the native's father holds a high position there is not much benefit from that.
The position of Jupiter and Mars in Pisces and Saturn and Ketu in Aries
indicates that the native's brothers will be well educated, powerful and hold
high positions ingreat institutions.
The above mentioned disposition in the horoscope of the native indi
cates that the native will through much efforts become an instructor. Further,
from the position of Saturn in Aries to Sagittarius there are no planets in
between except Rahu. This indicates that the native will have no good fortune
till he passes his 30th year.
